reviews.review_description:
Update: Glitches now fixed!

Bought this just for basic fun of punching things, but have to close my left eye when playing because it's nothing but vertical lines and glitches.  Right eye works fine.

Can this be fixed for the left eye view?

First, thank you developers for this punching game, more gameplay please, need better and simple user interface to allow more user options, adjust player height,  speed and more if possible.  Please continue to improve and more gameplay, indoor and outdoor environments if possible for everyone to enjoy this wo

developer_response.body: Thank you for your constructive feedback! We truly appreciate your support and are committed to delivering a better experience. A new update will be released soon, and we’ll continue to enhance the content and settings to meet your expectations.

reviews.review_title: Line in the middle of the game😡
reviews.review_description:
There are lines in the middle of the game. It is UNPLAYABLE.  
Want a refund

developer_response.body: We haven't encountered this issue before, but our team will thoroughly investigate it. If you'd like to provide more details, please feel free to reach out to us at info@simofun.com. Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.review_title: I’m rating it high so people see this
reviews.review_description: 9 sentences WE GOT MOBILE GAMES IN VR BEFORE GTA6

developer_response.body: We’re eagerly waiting for GTA 6 too, but in the meantime, we’re happy to bring fun experiences to VR! Thank you for your comment, and we’re working on delivering even more. 🎮😄

reviews.review_description: I wasn’t expecting a lot from $3 game, but I literally can’t even play at all. Straight up glitches from the start.
